title: arctostaphylos glandulosa subsp. adamsii
intro: Arctostaphylos glandulosa subsp. adamsii, also known as Point Reyes manzanita or Adams manzanita, is a subspecies of the manzanita plant, a drought-tolerant shrub native to the coastal regions of California. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos glandulosa subsp. adamsii include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Arctostaphylos glandulosa subsp. adamsii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
